title: Vyras
description: Vyras is the forge version of my take on trying to add RPG features to Minecraft.
body:
**NOTICE:** This modpack uses mods that are on Modrinth, and multiple mods that are from CurseForge. The CurseForge mods are as follows: - [Callable Horses](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/callable-horses) - [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue) - [Dreadsteel (Addon for Ice & Fire)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dreadsteel) - [FLib (Library Mod)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flib) - [Mob Stages Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-stage-reborn) - [Paragliders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paragliders) - [Sophisticated Core (Library Mod)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-core) - [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) - [Sophisticated Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage) - [Simple Storage Network](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-storage-network) Vyras is my personal take on adding RPG features into Minecraft Some of the mods to help achieve that feeling are: **New Content:** - New Dimensions: Blue Skies, The Aether, Deeper and Darker - Combat and Weapons: Better Combat, Simply Swords, Iron's Spellbooks, Ars Nouveau! - Technology and Automation: Create, Automobility - Mob Overhauls: Illager Overhauls (It Takes A Pillage, Illager Revolution, Illager Invasion) - Dungeon and Adventure Mods: When Dungeons Arise, Integrated Structures/Villages/Stronghold **Multiplayer Friendly!**
[Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) is included into the pack so each player has their own instanced loot from chests! Play with your friends easily with the [Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) mod included!
